overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style game showing a character with red hair navigating a futuristic city at night. The camera follows the character through wet streets illuminated by neon signs and digital billboards, ascending stairs and exploring the urban environment with light vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower plaza with stairs leading to upper street

events.description: pedestrian enters view from the right side of the plaza and walks across

agents.ego_description: walking through the wet plaza toward the stone stairs, passing by planters and illuminated billboards

notable_agents.action: walking across the plaza from right to left in front of the camera

entered.detail: tall building facade with large purple and pink digital advertisements
wide stone stairs leading up to the upper street level
large rectangular planter containing trees and greenery
reflective wet tiled ground surface mirroring the neon lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wet urban plaza at night, with the camera moving toward a wide stone staircase. Large digital billboards illuminate the left side while planters with trees line the right. A pedestrian crosses the plaza from right to left around the 6-second mark.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stone staircase between plaza levels

events.description: entering the covered stone staircase from the lower plaza
reaching the top of the stairs and approaching the street entrance

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone stairs toward the upper street level between modern building walls

entered.detail: metal and stone railings lining both sides of the staircase
illuminated wall-mounted lights along the stair walls

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the stone staircase between modern building walls, transitioning from the lower plaza to the upper street level. Wall-mounted lights illuminate the stairs as the camera approaches the street entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper city street with commercial buildings and traffic barriers

events.description: exiting the stairs onto the upper street level with open sky visible
camera shifts to follow the player character with red hair walking ahead
futuristic vehicle drives past on the street to the left

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past the W-logo building, following the character with red hair

notable_agents.action: player character with red hair walking ahead on the sidewalk
futuristic black sedan driving along the wet street

entered.detail: modern building facade with illuminated white W corporate logo
orange and silver metal barriers lining the sidewalk edge
tall street lamp with horizontal neon light fixture
tall building with yellow and black industrial styling marked with 01

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto the upper street, the camera follows a character with red hair along a sidewalk lined with orange traffic barriers. The W-logo building dominates the left side while futuristic vehicles pass on the wet street. The character walks ahead and slightly to the left before moving toward the left side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with red storefront and digital advertisements

events.description: turning the corner along the red commercial building
camera pans upward to view the towering cyberpunk architecture above

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk alongside the red commercial building, occasionally looking up at the towering architecture

notable_agents.action: red and black futuristic sports car driving past on the wet street

entered.detail: low-rise red building with large curved digital advertisement screens
large vertical screen displaying a woman's face advertisement
elevated walkway connecting buildings across the street

segments.scene_description: Continuing down the sidewalk alongside a red commercial building with curved digital screens, the camera occasionally pans upward to reveal towering cyberpunk architecture and overhead pedestrian bridges. Vehicles continue to pass on the adjacent street as the camera moves deeper into the urban canyon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, neon-lit urban plaza up into the dense architectural canyon of a futuristic city. It begins by gliding across a wet plaza toward a wide stone staircase, passing digital billboards and planters as a pedestrian crosses the path. As the camera ascends the stairs between modern walls, the open space of the plaza gives way to a narrower transition that leads directly onto an upper street level. The scene then opens onto a sidewalk where the camera follows a red-haired character past orange traffic barriers and a prominent W-logo building, with futuristic vehicles streaming by on the rain-slicked road. Finally, the perspective shifts deeper into the urban environment, panning upward toward towering cyberpunk skyscrapers and overhead pedestrian bridges while moving alongside a red commercial building with curved digital screens.
